text:
# In the High Court of Justice

In the [High Court of Justice, 	
Family Division] / [Family Court]

sitting at [Court name]	       Case No: [Case number]

[The Children Act 1989] /

[The [name of statute] Act [year]]

(delete or adapt as appropriate)

The [Marriage] / [Civil Partnership] / [Relationship] / [Family] of [applicant name] / [further respondent name] and [respondent name]

The child[ren]

[Name of child]	[Girl] /	[Boy]		[dob dd/mm/yy]

[Name of child]	[Girl] /	[Boy]		[dob dd/mm/yy]

After hearing [name the advocate(s) who appeared]
After consideration of the documents lodged by the Parties

ORDER MADE BY [NAME OF JUDGE] ON [DATE] SITTING IN [OPEN COURT] / [PRIVATE]

The parties

The applicant is [applicant name/Local Authority name] [(the ‘Local Authority’)], represented by [barrister/solicitor name] [instructed by [solicitor name and firm name] whose contact details are [ref, phone number and email]]

The first respondent is [respondent name], represented by [barrister/solicitor name] [instructed by [solicitor name and firm name] whose contact details are [ref, phone number and email]]

The second respondent is [respondent name], represented by [barrister/solicitor name] [instructed by [solicitor name and firm name] whose contact details are [ref, phone number and email]]

The third respondent is the child [child’s name] acting by [his] / [her] guardian [guardian name], represented by [barrister/solicitor name] [instructed by [solicitor name and firm name] whose contact details are [ref, phone number and email]]

Recitals

This is an order for medical information to be provided to this court by [specify the provider].

The reason that this request for information is made is [specify].
